title: Xtra Salty Ethiopian Galangal Atakilt Wat
description: A salty and savory Ethiopian dish featuring galangal, perfect for a date night, this flexitarian-friendly atakilt wat is made with poached ingredients and has a unique glassy-jelly texture.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped red bell pepper and cook until it is tender.
Add the chopped tomato and cook until it is soft.
Add the chopped galangal and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the berbere spice and salt, and stir to combine.
Add the water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Use an immersion blender to puree the mixture to a glassy-jelly texture.
